fileContext.overview: This file provides functionality for tracking and persisting usage statistics of language models (LLMs) across multiple workflow runs, including input/output tokens, request counts, and error rates.

symbols.name: ProviderStats
symbols.purpose: Represents statistics for a single LLM provider, including input/output tokens, request counts, and error rates.
symbols.behavior: Stores and updates provider-specific statistics, such as input/output tokens, request counts, and error rates.
symbols.limitations: Does not account for concurrent updates from multiple workflow runs.

symbols.name: UsageStatsData
symbols.purpose: Represents the overall usage statistics, including global workflow runs and provider-specific statistics.
symbols.behavior: Stores and updates the overall usage statistics, including global workflow runs and provider-specific statistics.
symbols.limitations: Does not account for concurrent updates from multiple workflow runs.

symbols.name: StatsDisplay
symbols.purpose: Represents the displayable statistics for a single provider, including averages and totals.
symbols.behavior: Calculates and displays the statistics for a single provider, including averages and totals.
symbols.limitations: Does not account for concurrent updates from multiple workflow runs.

symbols.name: UsageTracker
symbols.purpose: A lightweight accumulator that tracks usage statistics for a single workflow run.
symbols.behavior: Records and updates usage statistics for a single workflow run, including input/output tokens, request counts, and error rates.
symbols.limitations: Does not account for concurrent updates from multiple workflow runs.

symbols.name: getStatsDisplay
symbols.purpose: Calculates and returns the displayable statistics for a single provider.
symbols.behavior: Calculates and returns the displayable statistics for a single provider, including averages and totals.
symbols.limitations: Does not account for concurrent updates from multiple workflow runs.

symbols.name: loadUsageStats
symbols.purpose: Loads the persisted usage statistics from disk.
symbols.behavior: Loads the persisted usage statistics from disk and returns the data as a UsageStatsData object.
symbols.limitations: Does not account for concurrent updates from multiple workflow runs.

symbols.name: saveUsageStats
symbols.purpose: Saves the usage statistics to disk.
symbols.behavior: Saves the usage statistics to disk, overwriting any existing data.
symbols.limitations: Does not account for concurrent updates from multiple workflow runs.

symbols.name: persistWorkflowUsage
symbols.purpose: Merges a completed workflow run's tracker into the persisted stats.
symbols.behavior: Merges a completed workflow run's tracker into the persisted stats, updating the provider-specific statistics and global workflow runs.
symbols.parameters: providerName: string, tracker: UsageTracker, filesAnalyzed: number, filesFromCache: number, errorCount: number
symbols.limitations: Does not account for concurrent updates from multiple workflow runs.

symbols.name: resetUsageStats
symbols.behavior: Resets all persisted usage statistics, overwriting any existing data.
symbols.limitations: Does not account for concurrent updates from multiple workflow runs.
